name: Neapolitan Tomato Halves
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
1 tsp chopped fresh rosemary or 1 tsp dried rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not peel the tomatoes for this recipe.
2. Cut into halves and around the stem end, discarding the core.
3. Slice each tomato in half.
4. Cut the garlic lengthwise into very thin slivers.
5. Make several small gashes into the cut portions of the tomatoes and stuff each gash with a sliver of garlic.
6. Oil a baking dish and arrange the tomatoes on it.
7. Sprinkle the tomatoes with salt and pepper.
8. Liberally sprinkle the tomatoes with oil, then sprinkle with rosemary.
9. Place under a medium flame and let cook gently until hot and bubbling and edges of the tomatoes start to burn.
10. Remove from baking dish and let stand until tomatoes are cold.
11. Sprinkle with basil and serve cold.
